fields.label: Persona
fields.options:
Borrower
Loan Officer
Branch Manager
Collector
Admin
fields.description: Choose the role this person will have. The form adapts to show only the fields that role needs. Borrowers use the portal; staff use the desk.

fields.label: Email
fields.description: Used as the login username. Must be unique.

fields.label: Mobile
fields.description: Used for SMS payment reminders (borrowers) and alerts (staff).

fields.label: 3. Staff assignment
fields.description: Shown only for staff personas (Loan Officer, Branch Manager, Collector, Admin).

fields.label: Branch
fields.description: The branch (Cost Center) this staff member belongs to. Required for all staff personas.

fields.label: Department
fields.description: Optional. Defaults to the branch's department if left blank.

fields.label: Gender
fields.description: Optional. Defaults to 'Male' if left blank (HRMS requires a value).

fields.label: Date of Birth
fields.description: Optional. Leave blank if unknown; the system uses a default for HRMS.

fields.label: 3. Borrower details
fields.description: Shown only for the Borrower persona.

fields.label: National ID
fields.description: Used for KYC / compliance verification. Carried over to the borrower's compliance record so KYC is one click away.

fields.label: Send welcome email with password setup link
fields.description: Sends a branded welcome email with a password-reset link so the new user can set their initial password.

fields.label: Created records
fields.description: Auto-filled after submit. Click a link to open the created record.
